title: Tissa gracilis
taxonomy: Tissa gracilis is classified within the family Annonaceae, which consists of flowering plants commonly known as custard apples. The genus Tissa is a part of the Annonaceae family and is native to tropical Asia. Tissa gracilis is a species of flowering plant that is often found in tropical regions. The classification of Tissa gracilis is further detailed under the order Magnoliales. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other species within the Annonaceae family.
